title: "@Override" Annotation on Overriding and Implementing Methods
description: This rule enforces using the @Override annotation on methods that override a parent method or implements an interface or abstract method. The annotation improves code readability by explicitly indicating the methods are overridden. The rule does not apply to methods from the Object class such as equals(), hashCode(), toString(), etc.
recommendation: Add the @Override annotation to methods that override a parent method or implement an interface or abstract method.
impact: Improves code readability by making it explicit that methods are overridden.

checks.message: Add @Override annotation to methods that override a parent method
